zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Standish於1424年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親Sir Alexander Standish24歲，母親Constance Gerrard23歲。他和Margaret Radcliffe至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1468年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Standish于1424年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Standish24岁，母亲Constance Gerrard23岁。他和Margaret Radcliffe至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1468年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Standish was born in 1424, in Standish, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Alexander Standish, was 24 and his mother, Constance Gerrard, was 23. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Radcliffe. He died in 1468, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Standish est né en 1424, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alexander Standish, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Constance Gerrard, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Radcliffe. Il est décédé en 1468, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Standish 1424 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Standish 24 und seine Mutter Constance Gerrard 23. Er hatte mit Margaret Radcliffe mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1468 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Standish è nato il nel 1424 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Standish, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Constance Gerrard, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Margaret Radcliffe. Morì nel 1468, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Standishが1424年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Standishは24歳，母Constance Gerrardは23歳であった。彼はMargaret Radcliffeとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1468年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Standish(이)가 1424년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Standish(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Gerrard(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margaret Radcliffe(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Standish nasceu em 1424, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alexander Standish, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Constance Gerrard, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Margaret Radcliffe. Ele faleceu em 1468, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Standish родился в 1424 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Standish было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Constance Gerrard, 23. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Margaret Radcliffe. Он умер в 1468 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Standish nació en 1424, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alexander Standish, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Constance Gerrard, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Margaret Radcliffe. Murió en 1468, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
